name: ᯓ★ park (jay) jongseong
description:
"you know what? fuck you!"

do it for me.

fuck me

───────────────────

‍‍

[ ♡ ] it's normal for a couple who have been dating for so long to argue, but jay was just pissed off about all that drama coming from you right in the middle of a restaurant. in the car, the atmosphere was already too tense and you wouldn't stop complaining, so he lost his patience and told you to go fuck yourself. he just didn't expect to hear a "fuck me" coming out of your beautiful lips.

‍‍

───────────────────

when i see jay i think the same thing as doja when she says "i could fuck him in the rain, i could fuck him in the range, i could fuck him everyday, i'ma fuck him 'til he sang" 🤓
